require "GradingBase.pl"; CmndLine ("d:f:", 1, 1000000); require "GradingCommon.pl"; $assgn = shift; if ($#ARGV > 0 && defined ($opt_f)) { &Usage } if (! AssignmentExists ($assgn)) { Fatal ("Error: assignment $assgn not found."); } if (de

("Error: assignment $assgn not found."); } if (defined ($opt_f) && ! -r $opt_f) { Fatal ("Error: could not read file $opt_f."); } if (defined ($opt_d) && ! defined (ToTime ($opt_d))) { Fatal ("Error: bad date format: $opt_d."); } if (defi

("Error: bad date format: $opt_d."); } if (defined ($opt_d)) { $timestamp = TimeToTimeStamp (ToTime ($opt_d)); } else { $timestamp = TimeToTimeStamp (time ()); } # Usage: EnterSubmission LOGIN sub EnterSubmission { my $login = shift;

OGIN sub EnterSubmission { my $login = shift; if (!StudentExists ($login)) { Warn ("Student $login not registered."); next; } if (SubmissionExists ($login, $assgn)) { Warn ("Submission of $assgn for $login already exists."); next;

ion of $assgn for $login already exists."); next; } open (DUMMY, ">$SUBMISSION_DIR/$assgn/$login.$timestamp") || Fatal ("Could not create $SUBMISSION_DIR/$assgn/$login.$timestamp: $!"); close DUMMY; } Note ("Noting submissions for assi

close DUMMY; } Note ("Noting submissions for assignment $assgn, time stamp $timestamp."); if (! (-d "$SUBMISSION_DIR/$assgn" && -w "$SUBMISSION_DIR/$assgn")) { InitDir ("$SUBMISSION_DIR/$assgn", 02770, $STAFF_GROUP) || Fatal ("Could not cr

02770, $STAFF_GROUP) || Fatal ("Could not create $SUBMISSION_DIR/$assgn"); } if (defined ($opt_f)) { open (SUBMISSIONS, "<$opt_f") || Fatal ("Could not open $opt_f: $!"); while ( ) { if (/^\s*(\S+)/) { EnterSubmission ($1); }
f (/^\s*(\S+)/) { EnterSubmission ($1); } } close SUBMISSIONS; } else { foreach $login (@ARGV) { EnterSubmission ($login); } } exit 0;
